name: componentry-circuit-board
title: Circuit Board
author: Harsh Jadhav
description: Draws caller-defined nodes and orthogonal connections with optional directional signal pulses.

changes: Repointed the utility import; added collision-free SVG identifiers, an accessible label, system-aware theme detection, viewport and tab pausing, and reduced-motion states; removed fixed example patterns and unrelated auxiliary exports.

modifications.change: Repointed the utility import; added collision-free SVG identifiers, an accessible label, system-aware theme detection, viewport and tab pausing, and reduced-motion states; removed fixed example patterns and unrelated auxiliary exports.
modifications.reason: Ship only the reusable caller-driven network visual without ID collisions, perpetual motion for opted-out users, or bundled demo compositions.
